message: Node started: The user needs the full, official problem statement for 'USACO 2024 US Open Platinum Identity Theft'. The previous searches were too broad. Please perform a targeted search to find the complete text, including: 1) The full problem description, 2) Input/Output formats, 3) Constraints (specifically N and string lengths), 4) All sample test cases, and 5) The specific mathematical/string condition being optimized (e.g., what property the strings must satisfy). Look specifically for pages on 'usaco.guide' or official USACO contest archives.
